programme.title: Motorvision.TV #Spotted
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Motorvision.TV #Spotted
programme.desc: The compact cars Mercedes A45 AMG Performmaster and MTM Audi RS3 R are loud, fast and extremely honed; examining the myth of Ferrari and taking a look behind the scenes of the Rolls Royce Bespoke production.

programme.title: Motorvision.TV #Spotted
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Motorvision.TV #Spotted
programme.desc: The Route 66 from Chicago to Santa Monica is the most legendary road in the world; following the old highway and experiencing the myth behind this former arterial road; a double-pack of GTR with the Nissan GTR and Mercedes-AMG GT R.

programme.title: Motorvision.TV #Spotted
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Motorvision.TV #Spotted
programme.desc: With its Model S, American carmaker Tesla wants to establish electric engines in the full-size class; for the first time it is possible to attain driving ranges over 400 kilometers.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Tuning
programme.desc: In Ron's Garage antique scrap piles from the desert get turned into rolling pieces of art in accordance with customer specifications. If you want to cross the desert, Mercedes has the perfect vehicle.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Tuning
programme.desc: The Audi RS6 Avant isn't a boring whip at all, seeing that Audi's Quattro GmbH gets an output of 560hp out of the 4.2-liter V8 engine; tuning company Meyer isn't satisfied with that.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Tuning
programme.desc: Delving into the exceptional performance features of three high-powered cars: Mathilda Racing's Scirocco GT-R1, Bentley's GT3 R, and Volkswagen's Golf R.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Tuning
programme.desc: An up-close look at the power-packed customized versions of two popular luxury cars and the Stuck brothers' mind-boggling talent on the driving tracks.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Tuning
programme.desc: The BMW 3-Series, Nissan 370 Z or Citroën DS3 are average cars; as M-version, Nismo or Musketier, they get wild and become really powerful.

programme.title: Top Ten Show
programme.desc: The Japanese, who have many cars to offer, are the trail-blazers in the hybrid market.

programme.title: Top Ten Show
programme.desc: We take a little journey back in time and trace the development of the modern car and show the ten oldest car companies.

programme.title: Top Ten Show
programme.desc: Ten cars that have become icons.

programme.title: Top Ten Show
programme.desc: Creations that seriously raise the question of its designers' taste.

programme.title: Top Ten Show
programme.desc: It has been said that beauty is in the eye of the beholder. So we promise to maintain some objectivity. Desirable cars are what we want, and what we shall get..

programme.title: Top Ten Show
programme.desc: Limited and exclusive models.

programme.title: Track Masters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Track Masters
programme.desc: Following the progress of driver Uwe Nittle, as he gets ready for qualifying at the Truck Grand Prix.

programme.title: Track Masters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Track Masters
programme.desc: A look at the RCN Challenge: The BMW Driving Experience and the Devils Diner.

programme.title: Track Masters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Track Masters
programme.desc: Now that the 24-hour race is over we have left the Nuerburgring and moved to Bueren, Germany, where Raeder Sport is based. Famous for really fast front-wheel drives, it provides a lot of horsepower down on the track.

programme.title: Track Masters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Track Masters
programme.desc: The track at Nuerburgring is used for bike riding and running.

programme.title: MotorStories
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 MotorStories
programme.desc: Frank Slopianka is a racing junkie and constantly takes part in such events; US car fans Kati and Patrick join him for the Race 61, a rock and race festival in Finowfurt near Berlin.

programme.title: MotorStories
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 MotorStories
programme.desc: German entrepreneur Tillmann Moritz loves vintage cars and has a dream of driving through the U.S. in his Mercedes Cabriolet 280 SE 3.5; before he can make his dream come true, he needs to get his car across the French Riviera.

programme.title: MotorStories
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 MotorStories
programme.desc: Tillmann starts his dream journey in New York, the city that never sleeps; with his Mercedes 280 SE convertible he visits the legendary classic car dealer Eliot Cuker who made his fortune with his passion for old cars.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: A ride in the Mercedes AMG SLS GT on the airfield and in a Porsche 911 Turbo S on the racetrack; Audi R8's innovative light engineering.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Jaguar is back in the world of sports cars with the F-Type, looking good and showing against the BMW Z4.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Corvette, the Ford Mustang GT and the Chevrolet Camaro are the embodiment of the American sportscar.

programme.title: Lamborghini Huracan by O.CT
programme.desc: A lot of power thanks to a compressor; this optimized O.CT Lamborghini Huracán delivers over 800 horse power to get the blood flowing.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: The Jaguar XF-S is supposed to put pressure on BMW, Audi and co. in the business class segment; it brings V6 power, 380 HP output and all-wheel drive.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: BMW offers the X2 as a compact hipster SUV for young people; the DS 7 Crossback wants to convey the French lifestyle; Jaguar's E-Pace enters the market as a smaller version of the F-Pace.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: There are SUV models that have proven themselves, such as the Range Rover. The British manufacturer wants to reach an even broader audience and introduces a small Rangy: the Velar.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: With three and a half million units sold worldwide, the Mercedes Sprinter is one of the most popular commercial vehicles; in its third generation, it is more modern than ever.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Porsche quits the diesel business; hybrids such as the Cayenne E-Hybrid are expected to become their focus of attention; the team takes the BMW X4 on tour in the United States; there's also mountain climbing with the Volkswagen Touareg in Austria.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 WOF 2024 #16: Absa Cape Epic 2024 - Best of MEN
programme.desc: The ABSA Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through 648 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 15 475m of climbing.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 WOF 2024 #17: Swatch Nines 2023 - Pedal To The Metal
programme.desc: Experience 24 minutes of adrenaline-fueled feats as Nicholi Rogatkin (USA) and Casey Brown (CAN) take viewers through the final highlight edit of the 2023 Swatch Nines Mountain Bike event at Germany's Green Hill Bikepark, held from the 14th to the 19th of August.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 WOF 2024 #21: Škoda Titan Desert Series - Morocco
programme.desc: Welcome to World of Freesport and the mystic deserts of Morocco, where Athletes are not only fighting nature, but also one of the hardest racetracks on the planet. The dunes… The navigation…. The suffering… The legend…. The desert! The Skoda Titan Desert Morocco.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 WOF 2024 #22: 4Islands - Croatia
programme.desc: 4Islands MTB Croatia will welcome over 370 mountain bikers from all over the world for a five-day race on four Croatian islands. This year the order of the islands will be slightly different, starting with Krk, Cres, Lošinj and ending on Rab.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E32 Freeride World Tour 2016 - The Heroes
programme.desc: Every year since 2008, the world's best freeride skiers and snowboarders have competed for the world championship title in the Freeride World Tour. Thanks to the top sporting performances, the tour has become an integral part of the international winter sports calendar.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E36 Iceland Traverse - Mountain Bike Expedition - Iceland
programme.desc: Hans Rey and Steve Peat want to go through Iceland by mountain bike. Unlike touring bikers, they want to explore the best single trails. They developed a plan to conquer the deep rivers, snow fields and sandy sections along the way.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E41 LAAX Freestyle - Snowboard Halfpipe Special
programme.desc: The LAAX Open brings together the best professionals in the world with the next generation of riders - all competing in the same event. First-class snowboard competitions, powder runs, lifestyle, cultural and culinary delights - there is something for every taste.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E46 Athlete Profile - Aurelien Routens
programme.desc: Aurelien Routens from France was vice world champion at the Freeride World Tour 2013 and has made a name for himself with his outstanding web series "Carpe Diem". In our 26-minute portrait, the 36-year-old talks about his life as a snowboard professional.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E44 WOF 2023 #44: World Rowing Beach Sprint Finals 2023
programme.desc: In der heutigen Folge haben wir ein besonderes Format der World Rowing Tour. In Barletta, Italien, finden die Beach Sprint Finals von 2023 statt. Auf dem Mittelmeer kämpfen die Athleten um den Titel des diesjährigen Champions. Schauen wir mal rein!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E46 WOF 2023 #46: GKA Kitesurfing World Tour - The Stars of Wave
programme.desc: In der heutigen Folge ist es wieder Zeit für die GKA Kitesurfing World Tour 2023. Nachdem wir bereits das Highlight der Kitesurfing Freestyler gesehen haben, gehen wir nun zu den Kite-Surf Wave Athleten über und rekapitulieren das Highlight der ersten Saisonhälfte. Let's check out!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 WOF 2024 #06: GKA World Tour Season Wrap Up
programme.desc: The Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour has just wrapped up a record-breaking year packed with drama and excitement. The stars of the sport pushed kiteboarding to new highs in 2023 in their single-minded quest for world titles.

programme.title: Simple Session 2024 - Skate Final
programme.desc: Simple Session was born in 2000, starting as a small-town competition, it has now blossomed into one of the world's largest and most prestigious BMX and skateboarding contests. Simple Session 24 is set on August 24-25, promising a spectacular festival!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.sub-title: S01 : E34 Mystic Sk8 Cup - Skateboard Festival - Prague (CZE)
programme.desc: It is the 25th edition of the legendary Mystic Sk8 Cup. We are on the Prague island of Štvanice and a three-day skate festival awaits. We look forward to street and bowl competitions with prize money of CZK 800,000 and skateboarders from more than 22 countries.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.sub-title: S01 : E43 adidas Rockstars 2019 - Stuttgart (GER)
programme.desc: The popular competition for the international climbing elite is taking place for the ninth time. Around 4,000 spectators can cheer as world and European champions, World Cup winners and Olympic champions show why bouldering is one of the most difficult disciplines of all.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E47 Mammut Athlete Profile Dani Arnold - The Art of Iceclimbing
programme.desc: Daniel Arnold was born in 1984 in the Swiss canton of Uri and grew up in the small mountain village of Biel in the heart of the Swiss Alps. Dani and his brother experience all aspects of mountain life: hiking, skiing and climbing in some of the toughest climbing locations in the world

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E50 Profile Freeskier Nadine Wallner
programme.desc: Nadine Wallner is a freeskier, climber and mountaineer who has experienced incredible highs and devastating lows on her journey of discovery. She takes part in the Freeride World Tour, the pinnacle of freeriding competition for skiers and snowboarders.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E52 Mammut Project360 - Mt. Everest - Nepal
programme.desc: "Project360" takes digital mapping into the third dimension and makes the legendary Eiger North Face a virtual experience. A view through the eyes of the climber, directly from the wall. The impressive 360° panorama of the walls: www.project360.mammut.ch

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E53 Roopkund - Mountainbike Expedition to the Indian Himalaya
programme.desc: Hans Rey, Richie Schley and Joscha Forstreuter travelled to the Indian Himalayas to the mysterious Roopkund Lake, which is known for having hundreds of ancient human skeletons lying dormant at its bottom. This is followed by a descent of 3,500 metres in altitude.

programme.title: GWA Wingfoil World Cup Fuerteventura 2025- 26min-HL
programme.desc: The GWA Wingfoil World Cup Fuerteventura 2025 will take place from 28 July to 2 August at the iconic Sotavento Beach in the south of the island, where strong winds and turquoise waters create some of the best wingfoil conditions in the world.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 WOF 2026 #02: World Rookie Tour 2025
programme.desc: The World Rookie Tour 2025 brought together the world’s most promising young snowboarders, freeskiers, and skateboarders. With stunning locations and a vibrant atmosphere, the World Rookie Tour 2025 celebrated the next generation of action sports stars.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 WOF 2026 #06: World Downhill Skateboarding Championships
programme.desc: The World Downhill Skateboarding Championships in Tamanique, El Salvador, bring together the world’s fastest downhill skateboarders to compete on one of the most iconic and technical mountain roads in the sport.

programme.title: World Downhill Skateboarding Championship - Season Review - Women's Skate & Luge + Open Street Luge: 27min-HL
programme.desc: The 2025 World Downhill Skateboarding Championships season review recaps the global series held across locations including USA, UK, and Turkey. The season blends high-adrenaline competition with grassroots engagement, promoting downhill skateboarding worldwide

programme.title: World Downhill Skateboarding Championships Round 4 - Utah (USA) – Women's Skate & Luge + Open Street Luge
programme.desc: Park City Downhill, located in the heart of Utah's picturesque Wasatch Mountains, is the venue for the fourth round of the Downhill Skateboarding World Championships. Riders race down a 1.6 km course near Park City.

programme.title: World Downhill Skateboarding Championships Round 4 - Utah (USA) – Open Skate
programme.desc: Park City Downhill, located in the heart of the Wasatch Mountains in Utah, is the venue for the fourth round of the Downhill Skateboarding World Championships. Riders race down a 1.6 km course characterized by rapid descents.

programme.title: World Downhill Skateboarding Championships Round 1 - Axamer Lizum (AUT)
programme.desc: The Downhill Skateboarding World Championships in Axamer Lizum, Austria, kicked off the 2025 season from June 13 to 15. The course on the steep and technically demanding 3.3 km Hoadlstraße featured tight hairpin turns, long straights, and gradients of up to 21.8%, providing ideal conditions for high-speed racing and overtaking maneuvers.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E38 WOF 2025 #38: World Downhill Skateboarding Championship - Isle of Men (IMN)
programme.desc: The Downhill Skateboarding World Championships on the Isle of Man bring the world's fastest riders to one of the most challenging courses. In the “Stand Up Men” category, you can expect pure speed, fiercely contested races, and breathtaking descents.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026 - WOF 2026 _16_ Epic Series - ABSA Cape Epic Part 1
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 WOF 2024 #27: World E-Bike Series Round #1 & #2
programme.desc: Welcome from WES Round 1 and 2 in Trentino, Alto Garda, for the UCI E-MTB XC World Cup Season Opener. First time ever in the astonishing Dolomites mountain area in northern Italy, well-known for its tradition in e-biking, MTB and cyclo-tourism.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E38 WOF 2024 #38: Ötztal Cycle Marathon (AUT)
programme.desc: The Ötztal Cycle Marathon 2024 in Austria, taking place on the 1st of September, is the most challenging cycling marathon in the Alps, offering a captivating mix of valley and high alpine terrain. The course spans 227 kilometers and over 4,000 participants.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Winter Games 2019 - Ski & SNB Halfpipe Cardrona (NZL)
programme.desc: This is the seventh edition of the Winter Games New Zealand, taking place in Queenstown, Wanaka and Naseby in August and September 2019. The Winter Games NZ is one of the top 5 winter sports events in the world with 26 events at 6 venues over 17 days.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 LAAX OPEN 2020 (SUI)
programme.desc: The 5th edition of the LAAX OPEN is taking place from January 13 to 18, 2020. It is the snowboarding event highlight in Europe’s mountains and guarantees snowboarding at its finest.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 The legend of Muksu river - Tajikistan
programme.desc: This is a journey to the Silk Road in Central Asia into the adventurous world of canoeing. The Muksu in Tajikistan is one of the three most difficult rapids here. Once immersed in the river, there is no turning back.

programme.title: Cape Epic 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Cape Epic 2024 - Prologue
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through 617 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 16 500m of climbing.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E42 WOF 2024 #42: Golden Fly Series - Geneva (SUI)
programme.desc: On September 21st, some of world’s best long jumpers and pole vaulters will compete for important world ranking points on the world's largest World Athletics-certified mobile track and field facility, "The FlySwat", in a brandnew location in Geneva (SUI).

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 WOF 2024 #31: LAAX Highline World Championships 2024
programme.desc: The LAAX Highline World Championships 2024 will take place from July 17th to 21st in Laax, Switzerland, at the legendary GALAAXY on the summit of Crap Sogn Gion (2252m). The competition consists of two disciplines: Freestyle and Speed Highline.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E54 Searching for the Rivergod II
programme.desc: The documentary "Searching for the River God - The Journey continues" shows in fantastic images extreme kayaking on the most attractive and remote rivers in the world in Siberia, the jungles of Mexico and in Iceland.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E55 adidas Sickline - Extreme Kayak World Championship - The Documentary
programme.desc: This is the documentary about the history of the famous "Wellerbrücke" rapids, a famous section of the glacier-fed Ötztaler Ache river in Tyrol, and the adidas Sickline Extreme Kayak World Championship.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E61 The history of competitive Snowboarding
programme.desc: This Competition is in human nature. But that was far from the thoughts of early pioneers in the nineteen hundreds or those of Mister Sherman Poppin of Michigan. In the Christmas of 1965 he invented the Snurfer. This changed the history of snowsports.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Ride Aletsch - Geraldine Fasnacht
programme.desc: In this Episode we accompany Geraldine Fasnacht on her adventure to ride the famous Aletsch Glacier. A lightweight airplane and former Freeride World Tour Champion Emilien Badoux help her to fulfill her dream.

programme.title: GWA Wingfoil World Cup Gran Canaria 2025- 26min-HL
programme.desc: August 5th to 8th the world’s best wingfoilers will compete on the Spanish island of Gran Canaria for the Surf-Freestyle world champion title. A full roster of 28 men, accompanied by 14 women, from 12 nations around the world are set to battle it out at Playa El Burrero

programme.title: Lords of Tram GKA Big Air Kite World Cup France 2025 - 26min-HL
programme.desc: The second stop of the GKA Big Air 2025 season is about to kick-off at Lords of Tram in the legendary spot of Barcarès, France, powered by the epic Tramontana winds that sweep down off the snow-capped Pyrenees.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Mission Antarctica
programme.desc: Xavier de Le Rue, multiple freeride world champion and two times Olympian returned from a trip to Antarctica with mixed feelings, although he had the experience of a lifetime and discovered a new paradise he believed he had only scratched the surface of it.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Alaska or Bus´t - Profile Andrew Taylor
programme.desc: Alaska, one of the most sparsely populated areas in the world, has always been a dream-riding destination for American mountain biker Andrew Taylor. But being over 3,000 miles away from his hometown, it seemed a bit too far to just jump in the truck and go.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Bike2Boat
programme.desc: In the Bike 2 Boat adventurewe set off on a climate-neutral journey through the Alps together with four kayakers. We will accompany them on their search for extraordinary kayak spots and unforgettable experiences.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Alpine Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Dani Arnold from Bürglen in Switzerland is now one of the most renowned climbers in Europe. The project that made Dani famous was the speed record on the largest north face in Western Europe, the Eiger.

programme.title: 10 Years Laax Open
programme.desc: The Laax Open is one of the most prestigious snowboard events, celebrating its 10th anniversary this year. Against the backdrop of the Swiss Alps, the Laax Open offers a unique blend of energetic sport and lively après-ski culture.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E52 WOF 2023 #52: World Rookie Tour Finals - Freestyle Ski and Snowboard
programme.desc: In der heutigen Episode gibt es die volle Dosis Freestyle Snowboarding und Skiing. Junge talentierte Athleten aus der ganzen Welt können bei den World Rookie Finals 2023 ihr Können unter Beweis stellen. Schauen wir uns das mal an!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Engadinsnow - Silvaplana (SUI)
programme.desc: ENGADINSNOW is one of the oldest freeride competitions in the Alps. It is the world's only parallel freeride event. Teams of two ride the Corvatsch north face at the same time and compete with other teams.

programme.desc: The documentary "Searching for the River God - The Journey continues" shows in fantastic images extreme kayaking on the most attractive and remote rivers in the world in Siberia, the jungles of Mexico and in Iceland.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E55 adidas Sickline - Extreme Kayak World Championship - The Documentary
programme.desc: This is the documentary about the history of the famous "Wellerbrücke" rapids, a famous section of the glacier-fed Ötztaler Ache river in Tyrol, and the adidas Sickline Extreme Kayak World Championship.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E61 The history of competitive Snowboarding
programme.desc: This Competition is in human nature. But that was far from the thoughts of early pioneers in the nineteen hundreds or those of Mister Sherman Poppin of Michigan. In the Christmas of 1965 he invented the Snurfer. This changed the history of snowsports.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Ride Aletsch - Geraldine Fasnacht
programme.desc: In this Episode we accompany Geraldine Fasnacht on her adventure to ride the famous Aletsch Glacier. A lightweight airplane and former Freeride World Tour Champion Emilien Badoux help her to fulfill her dream.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 WOF 2024 #13: GKA & GWA - Best Of World Cup Cape Verde
programme.desc: Cape Verde is blessed with a moderate climate, north-easterly trade winds and warm ocean swells that break on the islands' reefs, making it a paradise for Kite-Surfing and wingfoiling. Sal island in particular boasts one of the world's greatest right-hand point-breaks.

programme.title: GWA Wingfoil World Cup 2024 – Sal (CPV) – Rider Profile | Elena Moreno
programme.desc: Cape Verde is hosting the GKA Kite-Surf World Cup 2024, bringing together the best kitesurfers in the world like Elena Moreno. From breathtaking freestyle tricks to impressive racing moments, her determination and talent are on display.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E24 WOF 2024 #24: Motorsurf World Championship #1
programme.desc: Motorsurf World Championship #1 - Fujairah (UAE) You’ve probably asked yourself many times what to do if you want to surf but the swell isn’t good enough. The athletes from the Motosurf World Championship have the answer. So let´s check out how they performed in Fujairah.

programme.title: Cape Epic 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Cape Epic 2024 - Stage 4
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through 617 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 16 500m of climbing.

programme.title: Cape Epic 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Cape Epic 2024 - Stage 5
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through 617 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 16 500m of climbing

programme.title: Cape Epic 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Cape Epic 2024 - Stage 6
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through 617 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 16 500m of climbing.

programme.title: Cape Epic 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Cape Epic 2024 - Final Stage
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through 617 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 16 500m of climbing.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 WOF 2025 #29: World Downhill Skateboarding Championships - Axamer, Lizum (AUT)
programme.desc: The World Downhill Skateboarding Championships in Axamer Lizum, Austria, kicked off the 2025 season from June 13 to 15. Around 80 riders from more than 15 countries competed over three days of training, qualifying runs and finals.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 FAI World Drone Racing Championship Grand Final - Ningbo (CHN)
programme.desc: The elite of drone racing take on the challenge on the 630m race track with 14 different types of obstacles and 25 flags to qualify for the finals and secure a share of the total prize money of $125,000.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Deepline - Lukas Irmler
programme.desc: Today we accompany German highliner Lukas Irmler and his friends on their expedition into one of the deepest caves in the world - and experience how they cross the lowest slackline ever!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 A Song for Tomorrow
programme.desc: This April, Mayan Smith-Gobat and Ben Rueck joined China's renowned mountaineers Liu Yongbang (Abond) and Xiao Ting on an expedition to explore the Qingfeng Valley on the border of Zhangjiajie, China's first and largest national park.

programme.title: WHY WE FLY
programme.desc: Ever wondered what goes through someone’s mind as they jump from a helicopter above the Canadian Rockies? Then ride along with the Team KAVU athletes as they wingsuit, skydive, and speedride above scenic Fernie, British Columbia.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 5 Peaks in One Day - Mountaineering
programme.desc: Zermatt, Switzerland - Swiss alpinist Andreas Steindl (26) has accomplished what most people deem impossible: he ran 30.66 kilometres from Zermatt to Saas Fee crossing five 4000m peaks. in only 7 hours, 45 minutes and 44 seconds.

programme.title: Motosurf Melco GP of Macau 2025 - HL show 1
programme.desc: The Motosurf Melco GP of Macau 2025 brings high-speed water racing to one of Asia’s most iconic motorsport destinations. Set against the striking backdrop of Macau’s coastline, the event showcases the world’s top motosurf athletes

programme.title: Motosurf Melco GP of Macau 2025 - HL show 2
programme.desc: The Motosurf Melco GP of Macau 2025 brings high-speed water racing to one of Asia’s most iconic motorsport destinations. Set against the striking backdrop of Macau’s coastline, the event showcases the world’s top motosurf athletes

programme.title: Simple Session 2024 - BMX Final
programme.desc: Simple Session was born in 2000, starting as a small-town competition, it has now blossomed into one of the world's largest and most prestigious BMX and skateboarding contests. Simple Session 24 is set on August 24-25, promising a spectacular festival!

programme.title: Nendaz Freeride FWT Challenger - Live delayed Part 1
programme.desc: The third FWT Challenger delivered an unforgettable day full of action on the legendary Mont Gond wall. Perfect conditions for the 63 riders from all over Europe, the USA, New Zealand and Japan.

programme.title: Gordon Bennet Cup 2025 - 57min HL
programme.desc: The Gordon Bennett Cup is the oldest and most prestigious gas balloon race in the world, bringing together elite balloonists for an extraordinary test of their endurance and skill. Pilots must cope with changing winds and night flights.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E15 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 15, Lightweight World Championship
programme.desc: A special World championship under the newcomers and lightweights in the Strongman world. Some of them will step from this to the heavyweights divisions.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E16 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 16, World Finals Turkey
programme.desc: After 15 outstanding competitions all over the world, finally we are here at the final competition of this year’s Strongman Champions League hosted in Turkey.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 1, Norway - World strongest Viking
programme.desc: Welcome to the land of Vikings - Norway - to the first stage of the SCL World Series 2016

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E02 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 2, Germany
programme.desc: The second stage of the SCL heads to the FIBO convention, Cologne. The leading international trade show for fitness, wellness and health hosts.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 3, Lithuania - Log lift World championship
programme.desc: For the third stage of SCL world series 2016, the athletes compete in Kaunas for the SCL Log Lift World Championships.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 4, Holland
programme.desc: Stage four is an epic competition and a few surprises. With 14 strongmen from all over the world, one newcomer left quite an impression.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E05 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 5, Latvia
programme.desc: This year Lauri Nami joins the starting list, back after last year's injury in Romania

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E06 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 6, Serbia
programme.desc: The SCL train stopped in Zlatibor for the stage 6 of the MLO SCL. 11 compete for the title in the home country of legendary Ervin Katona.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E07 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 7, Bulgaria
programme.desc: Bulgaria hosts the next stage of the SCL. Current leader in the World Series is Matjaz Belsak, youngest competitor and strongest man of Slovenia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E08 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 8, England
programme.desc: The competitors battle it out in the special event, the Atlas Steel Stone. This stone is made completely from iron and cannot be touched with any support.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E09 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 9, Finland
programme.desc: This stage sees the strongmen visit Vaasa, Finland. Residents here are familiar with the competition because some of the SCL icons are from their country.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E10 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 10, Finland - World championship under 105 kilograms
programme.desc: 38 athletes compete in the under 90kg and under 105kg SCL World Championships. From each weight class, the top 12 qualify for the finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E15 Stage 15 - TURKEY - WORLD FINALS - 2024 - PART 1
programme.desc: This episode contestants fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever. Twelve finalists from all over the world are in Turkey and will fight for the ultimate title: WORLD CHAMPION 2024.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E11 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 11, Romania Part 1
programme.desc: A two day, seven event battle with lots of spectators.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E12 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 12, Romania Part 2
programme.desc: Alex Moonen is leading. Part two of the competition in Romania showcases a new challenge - Hercules Hold.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E13 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 13, Curacao
programme.desc: In this stage in Curacao no one wants to lose the chance to fight for one kilo gold in World grand finals in Dubai.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E14 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 14, Portugal
programme.desc: The last chance to qualify for the World Grand Finale. Zageris and Belsak fight for the better position for the finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E15 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 15, Dubai World grand finals (Part 1)
programme.desc: We reach Dubai where we will crown the new champion for SCL 2016. This is part one of the world finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E16 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 16, Dubai World grand finals (Part 2)
programme.desc: In this last episode, the best athletes compete in Pole Push, Deadlift, Forward Hold and Loading.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E01 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 1, Norway
programme.desc: We are in beautiful Norway for the kick off of the 2017 MLO Strongman Champions League season. With partly cloudy weather and lots of snow, we have the perfect scenery for the athletes, who prepare for the first contest of the year.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E02 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 2, Germany
programme.desc: A definite highlight in this FIBO edition in Germany, Strongman Champions League introduced its new rules for a special team item. Graham Hicks tries here to set a New World Record on the biggest log in the world, currently held by Krzysztof Radzikowski. Boosted also by the presence of the acclaimed in the strongman circles names of Mark Felix and Danis Zageris.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E03 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 3, Lithuania
programme.desc: This weekend sees the Strongman Champions League Log Lift World Championships in Lithuania. Big lifting names such as Graham Hicks , Vidas Blekaitis and Vytatus Lalas are in the startlist to push some big numbers.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E04 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 4, Holland
programme.desc: The battle of the Dutch will take place this edition in Lichtenvoorde, a place very well known in Holland because of the famous “Black Cross”. The athletes will compete over six heavy events and the winner gets 25 Strongman Champions League ranking points.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E05 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 5, Serbia
programme.desc: Set in the beautiful mountain resort Zlatibor, the fifth stage of the Strongman Champions League 2017 sees 14 athletes from across the world competing for the gold medal of SCL Serbia 2017. The event welcomes top-athlete - and odds-on favourite - Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia), who has presented himself in an impressive shape so far. Can his opponents defeat him?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E06 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 6, Canada (Part 1)
programme.desc: The next two stages take place in Quebec. With eight events over two days, SCL Canada is a true ‘heavyweight’. The athletes compete in: Truck Pull, Deadlift with cars, Log Lift, and the Atlas Stones. The World’s Strongest Viking Jean-Francois Caron from Canada is a favourite, as well as current SCL leader Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and promising underdog Jimmy Paquet (Canada).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E07 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 7, Canada (Part 2)
programme.desc: Welcome to the second day in Quebec. The athletes are fighting hard to win this two-day event. The last points of this SCL stage can be won over four outstanding disciplines: Power Stairs, Dumbbell Press, Keg Toss, and finally, the legendary Farmer’s Walk. Who will leave Canada with the yellow ‘Leader Shirt’?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E08 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 8, Finland (Part 1)
programme.desc: Stages 8 and 9 of the SCL are hosted in Vaasa, Finland, taking place over a spectacular two-day event. After 3 wins so far, Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia plans to extend his lead at the top of the table. Among the other 13 highly motivated strongmen, two SCL legends will make their comeback to the competition: Former World Champion of 2015, Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland) and Dainis Zageris (Latvia).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E09 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 9, Finland (Part 2)
programme.desc: The fight for the Finnish trophy continues. In this unmissable SCL event, the strongmen battle for the win in the Carry and Drag, the Forward Hold, Deadlifting with Cars and the Loading Race. Belsak, Radzikowski and Zageris look good after the first day, but the others haven’t given up yet.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E10 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 10, Finland Lightweight World Championship
programme.desc: This under 105kg category event is the ultimate preparation for up-and-coming strongman athletes before entering the heavy class. The Lightweight World Championship is a special every year in the SCL calendar as it sees new talents rise and many promising athletes who are gearing up for future tournaments. A total of 25 athletes from 16 different countries make their way to Kokkola, Finland

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E11 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 11, Romania
programme.desc: Situated in the very heart of the Carpathian Mountains, Sibiu is a Romanian town where the climate is pleasantly mild, offering some of the best weather conditions for a strongman event around Europe. All this, without doubt, set the mood for the high results and showtime vibes in Stage 11 of Strongman Champions League. The competition in Sibiu was organized in six different disciplines

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E12 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 12, Curacao
programme.desc: From now on every stage of these series will be more than crucial. Curacao is a beautiful Dutch island in the Caribbean, with a great atmosphere to hold another stage of the MLO Strongman Champions League. Let’s see who takes the title here and who will secure a place in the next stage.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E13 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 13, Jordan
programme.desc: Ten of the world’s strongest men gathered in Amman to compete in Jordan’s first-ever Truck-Pull Championship. The contestants race against the clock while pulling a 21-ton truck across the track. One of the most fierce competitors to take part in the event was four-time winner of the World’s Strongest Man competition, Brian Shaw.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E14 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 14, Greece
programme.desc: Taking place in Corinth, Greece, considered by many the cradle of the sports competition games, an epic strongman battle will mark the last stage before the upcoming big two-day season’s finale in Chetumal, Mexico. In front of more than 5000 spectators, the twelve athletes compete in Log Lifts, Card Deadlift, Conan’s Wheel and Loading.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E15 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 15, Mexico World Finals (Part 1)
programme.desc: The first day of the two-part finale sees the strongest men competing in Carry and Drag, Dumbbell Lift and the Truck Pull. Everything is possible in this heated fight for the crown against the backdrop of stunning Chetumal, Mexico.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E16 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 16, Mexico World Finals (Part 2)
programme.desc: On the second day of the grand finale of the 2017 Strongman Champions League, the athletes have a last chance to secure the medals in the spectacular four events Weight for Height, Deadlift Cars, Forward Hold and The Loading Medley. Be prepared for stunning performances – and even world records!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E01 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 1, Norway - World Strongest Viking
programme.desc: Season 2018 begins with 14 strongest men in the world, all competing for the title. The competition kicks off in Norway. We’ll see typical Viking disciplines, team events and world records in heavy conditions in the land of snow and ice. They will suffer, they will freeze and fight in this first competition of the year for the title that they will carry on their shoulders throughout whole year.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E16 Stage 16 - TURKEY - WORLD FINALS - 2024 - PART 2
programme.desc: Part 2 of the world final of the Strongman Champions League tour 2024 in Alanya, Turkey. With three Events down and amazing results. Who will be the new World champion?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E02 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 2, Germany - FIBO Power
programme.desc: The next stop in strongest league of the world is muscle capital, largest number of strong shoulders per capichampions league on the planet. It’s a FIBO - the biggest expo on planet Earth and the second stage of 2018 Strongman champions league, in Cologne, Germany.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E03 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 3, Abu Dhabi
programme.desc: For the first time in history, Strongman Champions League will set up competition in Abu Dhabi. The line-up of super athletes, who are part of the SCL, includes former world champions Dainis Zageris (Latvia) & Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland), current world champion Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and biggest strongman in the World Sean O’Hagan (Ireland).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E04 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 4, Holland (Part 1)
programme.desc: Strongman classic in land where there is no place for anything else excepts strength, fight and endurance. Here are fourteen of the strongest men, fighting for the title of strongest in Holland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E05 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 5, Holland (Part 2)
programme.desc: We go back to Holland, where former champion Dainis Zageris is in leading position after the first three events. Alongside Radzikowski, he is in this moment favorite for world title, and also leader shirt holder.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E06 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 6, Finland
programme.desc: Stage six of Strongman champions league, 2018 is set back on north, in Finland. Here we have Matjaz Belsak, wearing SCL leader shirt, one of the biggest strongman in the World Mika Torro, fan favorite strongman in all over the World – Will Baggott, and also big name from Baltic – Aivars Smaukstelis

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E07 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 7, Serbia
programme.desc: Twelve strongman, including defending Worldchampion Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia , will compete on “Air spa” for the title of best in homeland country of Tesla, Pupin, Novak Djokovic. Matjaz Belsak is the SCL leader in this competition, chasing his third victory this season.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E08 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 8, Finland - U105 (Part 1)
programme.desc: The World championship in lightweights of the Strongman Champions League bring to us 50 strongmen from all over the world. All athletes are under 105 kilograms and for them this is the step up to the ultimate heavyweights.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E09 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 9, Finland - U105 (Part 2)
programme.desc: In this second stage of the World championship of lightweights we will find out who out of the 12 athletes will win the title in the under 105 kilogram category.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E10 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 10, Romania (Part 1)
programme.desc: The first part of SCL Romania 2018 will be hosted in Brasov. This episode features a new event for Strongman Champion League: “ The Chopper Pull”!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E11 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 11, Romania (Part 2)
programme.desc: After three classical Strongman events – Dead lift, Loading and Front hold – and one historical, Chopper Pull for the first time in history of Strongman, now we go to find out who will take title in Romania. This is the second stage in Romania and it remains to be seen who will win the title; Aivars, Travis or Krzyzstof?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E12 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 12, Curacao (Part 1)
programme.desc: The next destination of Strongman Champions League is in a piece of paradise on earth – Curacao. We bring to you some special Strongman events like the Rock Lift, Tug of War and Weight for Height in this episode.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E13 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 13, Curacao (Part 2)
programme.desc: This is the last competition before the grand finals. After the first three events Zageris is in top place, but can O’Hagan, Baggott, Petursson and Ortmayer step into the final? Last chance some of them will find through events like Forward Hold, Truck Pull, Dead Lift and loading very big objects.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E14 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 14, Road to Mexico
programme.desc: We bring you 50 minutes of Strongman inside. Fears, inspiration, courage, the best and worst from our finalists and their expectation of the finals. We also go to Poland and Germany to represent one day in the training of Krzysztof Radzikowski and Dennis Kohlruss. See all the finalists for Mexico in their comfort zone here, with their backgrounds /motivations /family and friends.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E15 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 15, Mexico - World Finals (Part 1)
programme.desc: The first part of the Strongman Champions League 2018 finals in Mexico. The last twelve athletes all pushing their boundaries and testing their limits to take the World title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E16 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 16, Mexico - World Finals (Part 2)
programme.desc: After 11 months and 14 competitions all over the world, it all comes down to the final in this episode. The strongmen must show their best skills and every mistake is expensive, so their concentration must be at the highest possible level. Will Krzysztof manage to take off back or will Dainis maintain his lead?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S06 : E01 SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 1, World Strongest Viking
programme.desc: This year 14 athletes from all over the world came to Fefor to compete in 6 cruel events. We'll see typical Viking disciplines on very heavy conditions in land of snow and ice, World records and athletes like the title defender Krzysztof Radzikowski, strongest guys from Holland and Germany and many more

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S06 : E02 SCL S6 Ep2 FIBO Power
programme.desc: The next stop in strongest league of the world is muscle capital, largest number of strong shoulders per capita in the World and of course, the most powerful host in Strongman champions league on the planet. It’s a FIBO - the biggest expo on planet Earth and the second stage of 2019 Strongman champions league, in Cologne, Germany.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S06 : E03 SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 3, Turkey
programme.desc: On a spectacular beach in Alanya, the MLO Strongman Champions League Turkey was viewed by thousands of spectators over a two day battle. With 12 athletes at the start over 6 cruel events, like Marble Stone Lift, Truckpull and Deadlift cars. And with the comeback of Travis Ortmayer / USA, former stone king and world ranked competitor. Winner of several SCL stages in the past.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S06 : E04 SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 4, Holland (Part 1)
programme.desc: Four times Strongest Man of Holland, Alex Moonen and the “Flying Dutchman” Kelvin de Ruiter competing here in Holland against 12 other strongest men in the world. There were 6 events in total, and 3 in this episode: The first event, a truckpull of 17.000 kg over 25 meters in max 75 seconds, was a real hard pull Also for the World Champion Truckpull, Holland’s runner-up Kelvin de Ruiter, but watch his amazing technique here.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S06 : E05 SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 5, Holland (Part 2)
programme.desc: Strongest Man of Holland, Alex Moonen and the “Flying Dutchman” Kelvin de Ruiter, competing in Holland against 12 other strongest men in the world. There were 6 events in total, 3 in this second episode; a Viking-press of 150 kg with the current world record holder Luke Herrick. The fifth event, a front hold of 25 kg is loved or hated by the athletes and lastly, the Stones of Strength.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S06 : E06 SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 6, Russia
programme.desc: An unbelievable TANK PULL of 50.000 kg was at the stage of SCL RUSSIA. Never seen this before! Not only a tank pull was done here but also the Viking Press/ Deadlift Max and Log lift reps were spectacular events to see here in Russia. With Mikhail Koklyaev also as event presenter, the former top 3 world strongest man from Russia was there

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S06 : E07 SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 7, Serbia
programme.desc: In this year’s edition on The Balkan Peninsula, we have competing the new talent from Estonia Marko Remlik together with Sebastian Kurek from Poland and yellow leader Kelvin de Ruiter

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S06 : E08 SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 8, Finland (Part 1)
programme.desc: Mateusz Kieliszkowski from Poland and Aivars Smaukstelis from Latvia are the strongman future of these days. Mateusz is the best man in the World at the moment to defeat. Only 25 years and such a fantastic strongman. They come here only for a win. But there are 12 more Strong athletes in this episode who want the title of Finland as well.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E01 Stage 1 - FINLAND – ICEMAN
programme.desc: After 10 years there is another edition of THE ICEMAN in minus 25 degrees and snow, and it is also the first stage in the MLO Strongman Champions League. With a new World champion from South Africa, Rayno Nel, it will be a challenging year for all the athletes to win the title again after 1 full year. But now they can win one very exceptional title, which is the SCL ICEMAN!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S06 : E09 SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 9, Finland (Part 2)
programme.desc: Mateusz Is leading after day 1 (previous episode) with close behind him Aivars Smaukstelis and Zake Muluzi from the UK. All very exciting! 5 events in this episode: Log Lift, Fram Walk, Deadlift, Sack Throw (Weight for Height), Loading medley.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S06 : E10 SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 10, Portugal
programme.desc: In this stage we have a new strong debutant: Oleg Sylka from the Ukraine. He is the new talent, who will stand up against the old champions like ZSydrunas Savickas and Brian Shaw and the Stoltman Brother from the UK. This new talent Oleg is a great character and we will see him flame in the episode in Portugal.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S06 : E11 SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 11, Callio
programme.desc: In Callio is the deepest mine of Europe/ 1500 meter deep, whereas the MLO Strongman Champions League also did 1 event. The Forward Hold, on a 1500 dept/ also a kind of new record/ as it was never done before. Spectacular and new in Strongman sport.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S06 : E12 SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 12, Ukraine
programme.desc: Kelvin de Ruiter is here to defend his SCL World Truck Pull Championships title. But this year, another strong field wants his title. Over 3 different pulls with 3 different trucks, and 14 athletes at the start, it will be difficult for everybody.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S06 : E13 SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 13, Caribbean
programme.desc: SCL edition Curacao 2019 was a great event, twelve power boys from all over made a great show at the white beaches, and 35 degrees Celsius heat in the Carrabean Islands. Two events were held on Friday at the beach of beautiful resort Sunscape, the other three were held near the world famous floating bridge at Willemstad on Saturday night.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S06 : E14 SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 14, Dubai
programme.desc: Hosted at Meydan Grandstand in Dubai, the Strongman Champions League had some really big names in the list like Mateusz Kieliszkowski from Poland, Brian Shaw from the USA and Krzysztof Radzikowski. In front of the Burj Khalifa the athletes do the deadlift max and 4 other heavy events at another spot in Dubai.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E03 GLORY 100 Last Heavyweight Standing
programme.desc: GLORY 100 features four GLORY world title bouts, four separate four-man one-night tournaments to determine who qualifies for the Last Heavyweight Standing finals, and several key matchups involving some of GLORY’s most popular fighters.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E03 GLORY 107 Rotterdam
programme.desc: GLORY welterweight world champion Chico Kwasi (45-6-2, 23 KO) will step up in weight to challenge GLORY middleweight world champion Donovan Wisse (23-1, 10 KO) in the main event of GLORY 107. In the co-main event, giants Tariq ‘Cookie’ Osaro (30-5-1, 17 KO) and Nico ‘Big Sexy’ Horta (26-11, 4 KO) will square off in a highly anticipated rematch.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E03 GLORY 100 Last Heavyweight Standing
programme.desc: GLORY 100 features four GLORY world title bouts, four separate four-man one-night tournaments to determine who qualifies for the Last Heavyweight Standing finals, and several key matchups involving some of GLORY’s most popular fighters.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E01 GLORY 98 Rotterdam
programme.desc: GLORY 98 features the highly anticipated return of Jamal Ben Saddik (36-9, 29 KO) against the Estonian powerhouse Uku Jürjendal (20-9, 16 KO). In the co-main event of the evening, GLORY Welterweight World Champion Chico Kwasi (43-5-1, 23 KO) is set to defend his title against number two ranked welterweight Teodor Hristov (18-3, 7 KO). Meanwhile, two of 2024’s best prospects will clash as Cem Caceres (18-1, 14 KO) faces Mory Kromah (31-2-1, 18 KO).

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E02 GLORY 99: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: The year-long, five-event tournament kicks off at GLORY 99 in Rotterdam Ahoy, featuring 32 heavyweights in 16 bouts on a mega all-heavyweight card.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E01 GLORY 98 Rotterdam
programme.desc: GLORY 98 features the highly anticipated return of Jamal Ben Saddik (36-9, 29 KO) against the Estonian powerhouse Uku Jürjendal (20-9, 16 KO). programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E08 GLORY 96 Rotterdam
programme.desc: A Champ vs. Champ superfight takes place in the main event as GLORY welterweight world champion Chico Kwasi (43-5, 23 KO) puts his title on the line against GLORY lightweight world champ Tyjani Beztati (27-4, 9 KO). In the co-main event, Donovan Wisse (21-1, 10 KO) aims to defend his GLORY middleweight world championship for a fifth time when he welcomes the challenge of top German Sergej Braun (44-13, 27 KO).

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E09 COLLISION 7
programme.desc: In the main event, ‘The King of Kickboxing’ Rico Verhoeven put his GLORY world heavyweight title on the line against number one contender ‘The Prince’ Levi Rigters in a hotly anticipated rematch from their GLORY Grand Prix final earlier this year. GLORY light heavyweight world champion Tarik Khbabez will collide with Donegi Abena in a trilogy fight to end their heated rivalry in the co-main event.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: Welterweight Wisniewski wants payback, after Jorge Masvidal used his training in underground, and barely legal fights, to whip Keith's brother in a previous match. This fight features Masvidal's freestyle technique and utter disregard for danger versus Wisniewski's appetite for vengeance.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: CJ Hollett is a Brazilian Jiu Jitsu Black Belt who loves teaching his craft. He is very well respected as an MMA coach for his technical mindset, high level skills and experience coaching UFC fighters. CJ loves working with MMA fighters because of their hunger to win, and believes it's time for Jiu Jitsu to make a resurgence in the MMA cage.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Dean Schmeichel has been coaching for over 20 years. Despite the allure of working as a full time wrestling coach in the martial arts industry, he has instead dedicated himself to work with kids and coaching school sports. Wrestling continues to be an interal part of Dean's life, and he finds the most satisfaction in helping athletes to understand and fall in love with the sport, as he did.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Josh Lee is highly respected in the MMA community for his wrestling skills. In this episode, we follow Josh throughout his day, and see some well known HK fighters who have trained under him, such as Jess Elverum. It is Josh's hope that his ability to transfer his knowledge of wrestling will make big difference in his students' fighting. He would also love to see more people take up wrestling.
